## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and follows repository conventions.
- [ ] Tests and documentation are updated.
- [ ] No credentials, private source, or personal/customer data are included.
- [ ] Every commit includes a DCO `Signed-off-by` line.
- [ ] Breaking changes include migration and release notes.
